input.command:
python3 -c "
import yaml, sys, os

yaml_files = [
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/roles/security-architect.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/roles/pentester.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/roles/auditor.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/roles/researcher.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/patterns/oracle-workers.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/patterns/debate.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/patterns/pipeline.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/patterns/swarm-consensus.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/patterns/plan-then-execute.yaml',
    '/Users/fr33m4n/colmena/config/library/patterns/mentored-execution.yaml',
]

errors = []
for f in yaml_files:
    try:
        with open(f) as fh:
            yaml.safe_load(fh)
        print(f'OK  {os.path.basename(f)}')
    except Exception as e:
        errors.append(f'ERR {os.path.basename(f)}: {e}')
        print(f'ERR {os.path.basename(f)}: {e}')

sys.exit(1 if errors else 0)
"
